data.body:
## Bug Report

**Observed in**: Host project using record-test-status.sh

**Bug 1: Multi-word test runner breaks execution (line 459)**

record-test-status.sh runs the test runner as:
  "\$RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER" "\$full_test_path"

This treats the entire env var as a single command (no word splitting). So RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER="npx jest --passWithNoTests" fails with 'command not found' because bash tries to execute the literal string "npx jest --passWithNoTests" as one binary name.

**Fix**: Use an array or eval, or split the variable without quotes for the command portion.

**Bug 2: No handler for .ts/.tsx files (lines 460-466)**

The file extension dispatch has no case for .ts or .tsx files. They fall through to the default branch which runs:
  bash "\$full_test_path"

This tries to execute TypeScript as a shell script, which obviously fails.

**Fix**: Add .ts/.tsx handlers that route to the configured test runner (jest/vitest/etc).
